name: grow24-ai
description: Enterprise SaaS Platform for Personal & Business Management

scripts.dev:both: concurrently -k -n main,univer -c cyan,magenta "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev" "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev:univer"
scripts.dev:hbmpone: cd HBMPONE/client && HBMPONE_PORT=${HBMPONE_PORT:-5175} HBMPONE_BASE=/HBMPONE/ VITE_API_URL=/api npx vite
scripts.dev:hbmp-docs-platform: cd HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/client && HBMP_DOCS_PORT=${HBMP_DOCS_PORT:-5177} HBMP_DOCS_BASE=/HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/ VITE_API_URL=/api npx vite
scripts.dev:ivvychainv2: cd ivvychainv2 && HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=${IVVY_PORT:-5176} WDS_SOCKET_PORT=${IVVY_PORT:-5176} BROWSER=none PUBLIC_URL=/ivvychainv2 npm start
scripts.dev:mcp-server: cd mcp_server/mcp && (test -x .venv_test/bin/python && .venv_test/bin/python scrape.py || test -x venv/bin/python && venv/bin/python scrape.py || python3 scrape.py)
scripts.dev:univer-hbmp: concurrently -k -n univer,hbmp -c magenta,green "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev:univer" "npm run dev:hbmpone"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n main,univer,hbmp,hbmpdocs,ivvy,microsoft,osm -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue,red,white "HBMPONE_PORT=${HBMPONE_PORT:-5175} HBMP_DOCS_PORT=${HBMP_DOCS_PORT:-5177} UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} HBMP_API_PORT=${HBMP_API_PORT:-4000} npm run dev" "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev:univer" "npm run dev:hbmpone" "npm run dev:hbmp-docs-platform" "npm run dev:ivvychainv2" "MICROSOFT_PORT=${MICROSOFT_PORT:-5180} npm run dev:microsoft" "OSM_PORT=${OSM_PORT:-5181} npm run dev:openstreetmaps"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:hbmpone && npm run build:ivvychainv2 && npm run build:univer:static && npm run copy:univer && node scripts/patch-univer-dist-paths.mjs && node scripts/verify-univer-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-hbmp-dist.mjs
scripts.build:hbmpone: cd HBMPONE/client && npm ci && HBMPONE_BASE=/HBMPONE/ VITE_API_URL="${VITE_API_URL:-/api}" npm run build && mkdir -p ../../dist/HBMPONE && rm -rf ../../dist/HBMPONE && cp -r dist/. ../../dist/HBMPONE/
scripts.build:ivvychainv2: cd ivvychainv2 && npm install && CI= PUBLIC_URL=/ivvychainv2 npm run build && rm -rf ../dist/ivvychainv2 && mkdir -p ../dist/ivvychainv2 && cp -r build/. ../dist/ivvychainv2/
scripts.build:univer: cd univer && CI=true pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build && pnpm build:demo
scripts.build:univer:static: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.24.0 --activate && cd univer && pnpm run install:ci && pnpm run build:static
scripts.copy:univer: mkdir -p dist/univer && cp -r univer/examples/local/. dist/univer/ && (test -f dist/univer/index.html || cp scripts/univer-index.html dist/univer/index.html)
scripts.build:all: npm run build:main && npm run build:univer
